title: [release-1.6] Stop trying to install sif prerequisite RPMs
body:
Fedora 36 repos no longer exist, so these installations always fail: https://cirrus-ci.com/build/5827089207656448 .

The SIF test in systemtest/020-copy.bats is already conditionalized on the presence of the tools, so it should now be skipped.

comments.body:
> FYI (I don't know if it applies to these old images), the current set of CI VM images already have these packages bundled in.

Oh, great point. And yes, `c4955393725038592` do have the packages bundled in, so the test continues to run.

(On `main`, https://github.com/containers/skopeo/pull/1821 has also removed these redundant installation steps.)
